title: An Act to Phase Out Vehicle Excise Taxes and Implement a Fee for Infrastructure Funding Based on a Vehicle's Annual Mileage
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 29, 2025
last_house_action: 3/20/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on TAXATION suggested and ordered printed On motion by Senator GROHOSKI of Hancock REFERENCE to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
